options.subject: Re: Welcome to email bro
options.body: Thank you for your message. I look forward to staying in touch once you return to Chicago. Please feel free to reach out if there is anything I can assist you with in the meantime.

options.subject: Re: Welcome to email bro
options.body: Awesome! Can't wait to connect with you when you're back in Chicago. We should definitely catch up and grab coffee or something soon. See you then!

options.subject: Re: Welcome to email bro
options.body: Sounds good! Let me know when you're back and we can meet up.
